acceptance: Supported cookie load/save behavior is mapped to libcurl cookie APIs.
verification: CurlDownloadCommand enables the libcurl cookie engine, maps load-cookies to CURLOPT_COOKIEFILE, maps save-cookies to CURLOPT_COOKIEJAR, and focused build plus RequestGroup routing tests passed.

acceptance: Browser cookie import is either removed or justified by current product value with a narrow owner.
verification: Firefox and Chromium SQLite browser-cookie import was pruned. CookieStorage, Cookie, NsCookieParser, Sqlite3CookieParser, SQLite CMake checks, SQLite test inventory, SQLite packaging version source, and SQLite release build steps were removed.

acceptance: netrc and auth behavior is mapped to libcurl where retained, and obsolete native parsers are removed.
verification: CurlDownloadCommand maps HTTP credentials to CURLOPT_USERPWD and CURLAUTH_ANY, maps FTP-family URI or option credentials to CURLOPT_USERNAME and CURLOPT_PASSWORD, maps netrc to CURLOPT_NETRC and CURLOPT_NETRC_FILE, and removes native Netrc/AuthConfig/AuthResolver ownership.
notes: The old http-auth-challenge option was removed because libcurl owns challenge handling.

target_files: src/AbstractProxy*; src/HttpProxy*; client HttpRequest/HttpResponse graph; tests
acceptance: Native proxy request and tunnel helpers are removed after libcurl owns proxying.
verification: AbstractProxy*, HttpProxy*, HttpConnection, HttpRequest*, HttpResponse*, HttpDownloadCommand, HttpSkipResponseCommand, and related tests were removed from source and disk. CurlDownloadCommand owns proxy URI, no-proxy, tunnel method, and proxy credential mapping.
notes: RPC server HTTP concepts remain for CM-009.

acceptance: Focused behavior tests pass and stale cookie/netrc/proxy source scans match retained ownership.
verification: cmake --build --preset default passed. Focused RequestGroup curl routing tests, FeatureConfigTest, OptionHandlerTest, git diff --check, packaging shell syntax checks, CSV parser checks, source file existence scans, and stale symbol scans passed.
notes: Removed legacy tests covered deleted internals only.
